title: "The Cognitive Divergence: AI Context Windows vs. Human Attention Spans"
description: "AI context windows grew 3,906x since 2017. Human attention dropped 87%. The curves crossed in November 2022. A cross-disciplinary review of the widening gap between artificial and biological cognition."
